## [15:09 - 16:13]

their dreams. You talk about them a lot. You talk about their problems, their dreams, their aspirations, their objections and how that could be holding them back. The more you talk about them, the more you bring in that revelation of self, talk about yourself, the more you can be inspirational, the more you can be aspirational, the more you will hook them in. So, you know, if you're going to do content, you absolutely, you should do content. Give them great content. Maybe 30 to 40 percent content. Maybe 50 percent content. But then you, you know, you want to be doing 20 or 30 percent inspiration, aspiration and then the rest, you want to be selling or you want to be talking about objections and overcoming those objections. If you go pure content, you'll lose people. So, don't do that. Don't get stuck in just the how. Keep on coming back into the why and the what. If you do that, you're going to keep people engaged for far longer. You have a much warmer list, much more responsive list.
